title: Unlocking Creativity: The Power of Open Source Music with ACE-Step 1.5
description: Discover the revolutionary ACE-Step 1.5, an open-source music generation model available in ComfyUI that is changing the way we create music. In this video, we delve into how ACE-Step 1.5 harnesses a novel hybrid architecture to empower musicians and creators to generate full songs in under 10 seconds using consumer hardware. Learn about its innovative use of a Language Model that acts as an omni-capable planner for music composition, allowing for scalability from short loops to extended compositions of up to 10 minutes. With an impressive score of 4.72 on musical coherence, ACE-Step 1.5 achieves commercial-grade quality, making it a game-changer for both amateur and professional musicians alike. Watch as we demonstrate the capabilities of this model, which can produce a full 4-minute song in roughly 1 second on an RTX 5090, while also running efficiently on widely-used hardware such as the RTX 3090. Whether you're a music producer, a tech enthusiast, or simply curious about the future of music generation, this video will unlock new creative possibilities and inspire you to explore the world of open-source music. Join us as we take a deep dive into the features, benefits, and practical applications of ACE-Step 1.5, and see how it can elevate your music-making experience to new heights.
